debug_info.goal:
case left
r : ℝ
f : ℂ → ℂ
hr : r ≠ 0
h : MeromorphicOn f ⊤
h₂ : 0 < meromorphicOrderAt f 0
⊢ MeasureTheory.Integrable (fun θ => ∫ (θ_1 : ℝ) in 0..2 * Real.pi, log ‖f (circleMap 0 r θ_1) - circleMap 0 1 θ‖)
    (MeasureTheory.volume.restrict (Ioc 0 (2 * Real.pi)))

failed_attempts:
have hInt := ρ₃'' (r := r) h
    have hFub := (MeasureTheory.integrable_prod_iff (ρ₃' (r := r) h)).1 hInt
    simpa [MeasureTheory.IntegrableOn] using hFub.2

have hInt := ρ₃'' (r := r) h
    simpa [MeasureTheory.IntegrableOn, MeasureTheory.ae_within_Ioc_iff] using
      (MeasureTheory.integrable_prod_iff (ρ₃' (r := r) h)).1 hInt

have h' := ρ₃'' (r := r) h
    simpa [MeasureTheory.integrable_prod_iff] using h'.1

have : MeasureTheory.Integrable
        (fun x ↦ log ‖f (circleMap 0 r x.1) - circleMap 0 1 x.2‖ : ℝ × ℝ → ℝ)
        ((MeasureTheory.volume.restrict (Ioc 0 (2 * π))).prod
          (MeasureTheory.volume.restrict (Ioc 0 (2 * π)))) := ρ₃'' (r := r) h
    simpa [MeasureTheory.integrable_prod_iff] using this

have hI := (ρ₃'' (r := r) h)
    have hI' :
        MeasureTheory.Integrable
          (fun x : ℝ × ℝ ↦ log ‖f (circleMap 0 r x.1) - circleMap 0 1 x.2‖)
          ((MeasureTheory.volume.restrict (Ioc 0 (2 * π))).prod
            (MeasureTheory.volume.restrict (Ioc 0 (2 * π)))) := by
      simpa [log] using hI
    have hAE :
        (∀ᵐ (θ : ℝ) ∂MeasureTheory.volume.restrict (Ioc 0 (2 * π)),
          MeasureTheory.Integrable
            (fun θ_1 : ℝ ↦ log ‖f (circleMap 0 r θ_1) - circleMap 0 1 θ‖)
            (MeasureTheory.volume.restrict (Ioc 0 (2 * π)))) := by
      simpa [MeasureTheory.integrable_prod_iff, ρ₃' (r := r) h, log] using hI'
    refine (MeasureTheory.integrableOn_congr_fun ?_).2 ?_
    · intro θ hθ
      rfl
    · have hInt :
        MeasureTheory.Integrable
          (fun θ : ℝ ↦ ∫ (θ_1 : ℝ) in (Ioc 0 (2 * π)),
            log ‖f (circleMap 0 r θ_1) - circleMap 0 1 θ‖)
          (MeasureTheory.volume.restrict (Ioc 0 (2 * π))) := by
        exact MeasureTheory.Integrable.integral_prod_left hI'
      simpa [MeasureTheory.intervalIntegral, MeasureTheory.integral_interval_eq_integral_Ioc] using hInt
